task_type: Type C small additive implementation — non-executing skeleton + contract tests only (no DB write, no executable gate, no backtest)
source_decision: P258D_D3_READ_ONLY_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_READY — instantiate the P258D-proposed skeleton as non-executing schema/stub modules
skeleton_path_rationale: Path lottery_api/research/d3_gate/ was explicitly proposed by the merged P258D plan. It is a brand-new, currently-absent subpackage; nothing imports it; the production app does not load it at startup. Files use stdlib only (dataclasses, enum, typing) and contain no DB/production/recommendation imports.

gate_status_enum.name: GateStatus
gate_status_enum.not_yet_rejected_semantics: NOT_YET_REJECTED is explicitly NOT approval; candidate remains observation-only pending separate human-authorized prototype + later corrected-OOS confirmation.

validation_stubs.behavior: Every stub raises NotImplementedError with a planning-only message. No real evaluation, scoring, null generation, paired testing, or p-value computation.

proof_no_executable_gate: No orchestrator/evaluator module was created. No function runs the gate, scores a candidate, generates nulls, computes p-values, or loops over draws. The only callable functions are validation stubs that immediately raise NotImplementedError.
proof_no_backtest: No backtest loop, no strategy execution function, no draw iteration. schemas.py is pure dataclass/enum definitions; gate_validation.py is NotImplementedError stubs.
proof_no_forbidden_paths_touched: Skeleton modules import only stdlib (dataclasses, enum, typing) and intra-package schemas. No import of DB, recommendation, registry, production, controlled_apply, or deployment code. Verified by contract tests scanning module source for forbidden import substrings.

next_allowed_task.title: D3 gate read-only CONTRACT VALIDATOR implementation only (if explicitly authorized later)
next_allowed_task.type: read-only contract validator implementation — implements the validation stubs as pure schema/contract checks ONLY; still no scoring, null generation, paired tests, p-values, candidate evaluation, or backtest
next_allowed_task.precondition: P258E skeleton merged AND separate explicit authorization for P258F
next_allowed_task.note: P258F may implement only the contract/schema validation logic (e.g., field presence, timestamp ordering, N-bet matching) — NOT the statistical gate evaluation.
